sections.heading: PART I: GENERAL INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: General instructions regarding the structure and conventions of the reporting.

sections.heading: 1. Structure and other conventions
sections.description: Details on the structure and conventions used in the document.

sections.heading: 1.1. Structure
sections.description: Overview of the structure of the reporting templates.

sections.heading: 1.2. Numbering convention
sections.description: Explanation of the numbering convention used in the document.

sections.heading: 1.3. Abbreviations
sections.description: List of abbreviations used in the document.

sections.heading: 1.4. Sign convention
sections.description: Description of the sign convention for reporting amounts.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to the reporting templates.

sections.heading: 1. Formulas for leverage ratio calculation
sections.description: Formulas used for calculating the leverage ratio.

sections.heading: 2. Materiality thresholds for derivatives
sections.description: Thresholds for reporting derivatives in relation to leverage.

sections.heading: 3. C 47.00 – Leverage ratio calculation (LRCalc)
sections.description: Template for calculating the leverage ratio.

sections.heading: 4. C 40.00 – Alternative treatment of the Exposure Measure (LR1)
sections.description: Template for alternative treatment of the exposure measure.

sections.heading: 5. C 43.00 – Alternative breakdown of leverage ratio exposure measure components (LR4)
sections.description: Template for alternative breakdown of leverage ratio exposure measure components.

sections.heading: 6. C 44.00 – General information (LR5)
sections.description: Template for general information regarding the institution.

sections.heading: 7. C 48.00 Leverage ratio volatility (LR6)
sections.description: Template for monitoring leverage ratio volatility.

sections.heading: 8. C 48.01 Leverage ratio volatility: Mean value for the reporting period
sections.description: Template for reporting mean values of leverage ratio volatility.

sections.heading: 9. C 48.02 Leverage ratio volatility: Daily values for the reporting period
sections.description: Template for reporting daily values of leverage ratio volatility.

C47.00.name: C 47.00 – Leverage ratio calculation (LRCalc)
C47.00.description: Collects data needed to calculate the leverage ratio as defined in Regulation (EU) No 575/2013.

C40.00.name: C 40.00 – Alternative treatment of the Exposure Measure (LR1)
C40.00.description: Collects data on an alternative treatment of derivatives, SFTs, and off-balance sheet items.
C40.00.section_heading: 4. C 40.00 – Alternative treatment of the Exposure Measure (LR1)

C43.00.name: C 43.00 – Alternative breakdown of leverage ratio exposure measure components (LR4)
C43.00.description: Reports the leverage ratio exposure values after applying exemptions and deductions.
C43.00.section_heading: 5. C 43.00 – Alternative breakdown of leverage ratio exposure measure components (LR4)

C44.00.name: C 44.00 – General information (LR5)
C44.00.description: Collects additional information for categorizing institution activities and regulatory options.

C48.00.name: C 48.00 – Leverage ratio volatility (LR6)
C48.00.description: Monitors the volatility of the leverage ratio, reported by large institutions only.

C48.01.name: C 48.01 – Leverage ratio volatility: Mean value for the reporting period
C48.01.description: Reports the mean of daily values of the SFT exposure value for the reporting quarter.
C48.01.section_heading: 8. C 48.01 Leverage ratio volatility: Mean value for the reporting period

C48.02.name: C 48.02 – Leverage ratio volatility: Daily values for the reporting period
C48.02.description: Reports daily values of the SFT exposure value for the reporting quarter.
C48.02.section_heading: 9. C 48.02 Leverage ratio volatility: Daily values for the reporting period
